use_cases: Dynamic animated background for landing pages and hero sections
Speed/motion visual effect for loading screens and transitions
Creative portfolio backdrop for design agencies
Gaming-inspired visual accent for tech products
Atmospheric effect for media streaming applications
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered speed lines shader component built with React Three Fiber. Uses GLSL shaders with procedural noise functions and mirrored UV patterns to create flowing, animated speed line effects. Features time-based animation, resolution-aware rendering, and a fullscreen quad setup for seamless background integration. Ideal for adding dynamic motion graphics to creative portfolios, landing pages, or tech product aesthetics.
